title: Project Workflow
summary: Structured project workflow policy for Cadre agents. Fill project-specific commands and review gates from repo evidence.

sections.heading: Guiding Principles
sections.purpose: Capture project-specific workflow principles plus Cadre packet ownership.

principles: Use Cadre packets for control-plane state

sections.body:
- Cadre state is packet-owned.
- `plan.json` is authoritative for planned work.
- `plan.md` is generated for human review only.
- Test-Driven Development is preferred whenever the task is testable.
- Project commands should be non-interactive and CI-aware.

sections.heading: Task Lifecycle
sections.purpose: Define how work moves from selection through verification and Cadre completion.
sections.body:
- Select work through Cadre status or implementation prep.
- Claim work before product edits.
- Verify changed behavior before recording completion.

sections.heading: Commit Discipline
sections.purpose: Describe product/control commit expectations for this project.

commitPolicy: Use one product commit per coherent task

sections.body:
- Prefer one product commit per completed task.
- Record task commit SHA evidence through Cadre packets.
- Cadre control-plane writes are committed by the packet that writes them.

sections.heading: Polyrepo Notes
sections.purpose: Document monorepo/polyrepo routing and repo-specific command expectations.
sections.body:
- In monorepo mode, run commands in the product root.
- In polyrepo mode, follow packet-provided repo routing.

sections.heading: Quality Gates
sections.purpose: State tests, coverage, review focus, and static checks expected before completion.
sections.body:
- Tests for changed behavior pass.
- Type checks, lint, static analysis, or coverage run when configured.
- Product-specific review focus is documented.

sections.heading: Phase Completion
sections.purpose: Define phase checkpoint and manual verification expectations.

manualVerification: Exercise user-facing behavior before completing the track

sections.body:
- Gather phase evidence through Cadre packets.
- Summarize manual verification when required.

sections.heading: Development Commands
sections.purpose: List exact commands agents should prefer for this repo.
sections.body:
- Test command:
- Format command:
- Build command:
- Other non-interactive commands:
